title: lygodium radiatum
intro: Lygodium radiatum, also known as the Australian climbing fern or climbing fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lygodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lygodium radiatum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. The herbal preparations of Lygodium radiatum include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
